roa.docketEntryComment: CSR LAURIE WARNER, PITCHESS IN CAMERA
NOT OF MOT&MOT FOR AN ORD TO PRODUCE DOC FOR INSPECT PURS 1043EC FILED

/CAL:HEARING ON MOTION TO SUPPRESS/AMEND:1 TO 653F(D)PC A MISDEMEANOR/X:DEFENDANT WIA AND WAIVED ALL THE IRREGULARITIES CONNECTED WITH THE AMENDMENT,/X:REFERRED THE DEFENDANT TO PTD ELIGIBILITY REPORT AND DEFENDANT IS FOUND ELIGIBLE,/X:DEVERSION DEEMED COMPLETED,/TEXT: COURT GRTS MOTION TO DISMPURS PC 1001,7 AS TO COUNT 2 /1001,7:2/

/CAL:PITCHESS MOTION/X:STIPULATION FILED IN OPEN COURT/X:PARTIES STIPULATED AS FOLLOWS: AS TO OFFICERS WITH STAR #114, AND 4067 TO: 1-FABRICATION, 2-FALSE ARREST/X:COMPLIANCE DATE IS 02-27-07/CONTD:03-02-07 DATE IN S22 CONFIRMED/
/TEXT:DEFT IS ORDERED HELD TO ANSWER/HOLDING/WIT SWORN:RODNEY FITZPATRICK/EXHMA:1=EVID ENV; 1A, 1B, 1C-BAGS AND CONTENTS; 1D-NARC FORM/HTA1:3/871D:4/X:DEF IS ON ORPJ STATUS/
/CAL:PRELIM/X:DEF ARRIVES AT 2PM, BW PREV ISSUED IS RECALLED, DEF FOUND INCONTEMPT AND SENTENCED TO 5 DAYS CJ, WHICH IS STAYED AS LONG AS DEF APPEARSIN COURT/CONTD:SET/STWPX/DOP/
/CAL ARRAIGNMENT/X PUBLIC DEFENDER DECLARED A CONFLICT/TEXT CONFL CNSL APPTD/CON:RUTH EDELSTEIN/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/STWPX/X:10 AND 60 DAYS WAIVED/987,2/DOP/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/CON:RUTH EDELSTEIN/FAW/DEFTARR/GTW/987,2/
